pi_items.source: GeoServer workspace naming conventions; Natural Earth dataset domain (naturalearthdata.com); task configuration

GeoServer namespace URI conventions (uses domain-based URIs per official documentation at https://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/rest/api/namespaces.html); Natural Earth official domain verified at https://www.naturalearthdata.com/; follows standard practice of using organization domain as namespace base

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a workspace in GeoServer for Natural Earth data. Natural Earth is a verified, real, public domain geospatial dataset (not synthetic) maintained by NACIS members and hosted at https://www.naturalearthdata.com/. The task metadata specifies workspace name 'natural_earth' and namespace URI 'http://naturalearthdata.com', both of which are verified as appropriate and follow GeoServer conventions: workspace names are user-defined identifiers, and namespace URIs should be based on an organization's domain (per official GeoServer documentation). The environment setup downloads authentic Natural Earth data from verified CDN sources (naciscdn.org/naturalearth and S3), including vector shapefiles at 1:110m scale (countries, populated places, rivers, lakes).
